title: Note 2 Home Screen
content: In contrary to yesterday's screenshot, I like keeping the Android screen clean since the OS allows me to arrange the icons anyway I like. I replace Samsung's Touchwiz with [Nova Launcher](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.teslacoilsw.launcher) and [Zooper Widget Pro](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.zooper.zwpro) for the clock widget. Touchwiz is too strict and it's icon size is way too big for my taste. The [Olive Tree Bible](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=biblereader.olivetree) and Kindle app used to be on my iPad but now they found a new place to stay. Also I revived Instagram but since I deactivated my original account, I've to sign up for a new one. And just like the iPhone, Twitter client must be on the right side of the dock. :)
